title: Fluorescent Lamp Ballasts
full_text:
4.2.1.2 Fluorescent Lamp Ballasts
Fluorescent Lamp Ballasts
1) Fluorescent lamp ballasts shall conform to CAN/CSA-C654, “Fluorescent lamp
ballast efficacy measurements.”
2) Electronic fluorescent lamp ballasts that are not within the scope of
CAN/CSA-C654, “Fluorescent lamp ballast efficacy measurements,” shall
conform to ANSI_ANSLG C82.11, “American National Standard for Lamp
Ballasts–High-Frequency Fluorescent Lamp Ballasts.”

sentences.text: Fluorescent lamp ballasts shall conform to CAN/CSA-C654, “Fluorescent lamp ballast efficacy measurements.”

Electronic fluorescent lamp ballasts that are not within the scope of CAN/CSA-C654, “Fluorescent lamp ballast efficacy measurements,” shall conform to ANSI_ANSLG C82.11, “American National Standard for Lamp Ballasts–High-Frequency Fluorescent Lamp Ballasts.”
